text:
PRPHRL_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV Access - Peripheral (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient had peripheral IV access. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
619 MIDLINE_ADMSN_CD MIDLINE_ADMSN_CD Other: IV Access - Midline (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient had midline IV access. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
620 MIDLINE_DSCHRG_CD MIDLINE_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV Access - Midline
